one_liner: Tidewater Logistics matches small ocean freight forwarders with verified drayage capacity at the Port of Norfolk.
use_of_funds_summary: Hire two operations leads and one capacity sales lead; expand to one adjacent port.
transcript_text: Tidewater Logistics is a two-sided marketplace matching small ocean freight forwarders with verified drayage capacity at the Port of Norfolk. We launched the marketplace 16 months ago. Gross merchandise volume in the trailing three months was 2.41 million dollars, up from 0.94 million dollars in the prior three months. Take rate is 7.4 percent of GMV, yielding 178,300 dollars of net revenue in the trailing three months. We have 64 active forwarders and 138 verified carriers, with weekly active match liquidity of 71 percent measured as the share of inquiries that received at least one bid within four hours. Contribution margin per match is 41 percent after carrier verification and dispatcher cost. Customer acquisition cost on the forwarder side averaged 980 dollars over the last quarter, with average annual gross profit per forwarder of 4,820 dollars. The 400,000 dollar check funds two operations leads and one capacity sales lead, enabling expansion to one adjacent Mid-Atlantic port within nine months. The team includes the former operations lead at a regional drayage carrier and a senior engineer who shipped real-time matching for a freight tech vendor. Regulatory exposure is limited to standard FMCSA broker authority, which we hold.
